title: NGATA Tri-Elemental Directed Activity
label: NGATA Event
heroDescription: Activities included the Challenge Course, Why Things Are Seen, First Aid Training and Canadian Forces Familiarization training.
galleryDescription: Cadets tackling the challenge course, obstacle training, and hands-on field activities from the NGATA Tri-Elemental Area Directed Activity.
